scripts.mobile:demo:android: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Set-Location 'apps/mobile'; npx eas build --platform android --profile demo-android"
scripts.mobile:demo:ios: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Set-Location 'apps/mobile'; npx eas build --platform ios --profile demo-ios"
scripts.mobile:demo:ios:submit: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Set-Location 'apps/mobile'; npx eas submit --platform ios --profile demo"
